info.name: Academix API Tests
info.description: API Test Collection cho Academix Platform. Folder 01 triển khai đầy đủ Auth APIs theo .github/prompts/tool-test.prompt.md.

item.name: 01 - Auth APIs
item.description: 11 test cases: Register, Login, Profile, Change Password, Refresh Token

exec: // TC_PM_AUTH_01 - Arrange: generate a unique temporary student so the register OK test is repeatable.
// This mutation creates a test user. There is no public delete-user API, so cleanup is documented in the report.
// TC_PM_AUTH_01 - Assert: registration succeeds for valid student data.
// TC_PM_AUTH_02 - Assert: reusing the email from TC_PM_AUTH_01 must be rejected.
pm.test('TC_PM_AUTH_02 response contains standardized error', function () {
// TC_PM_AUTH_03 - Assert: DTO validation rejects invalid register payload.
pm.test('TC_PM_AUTH_03 status is 400 Bad Request', function () {
pm.test('TC_PM_AUTH_03 response contains validation error', function () {
// TC_PM_AUTH_04 - Assert: seed student can login with identifier/password.
// Save accessToken, refreshToken, and studentId for the authenticated tests that follow.
pm.test('TC_PM_AUTH_04 saves auth tokens and user data', function () {
// TC_PM_AUTH_05 - Assert: valid identifier with wrong password is unauthorized.
pm.test('TC_PM_AUTH_05 response contains unauthorized error', function () {
// TC_PM_AUTH_06 - Assert: unknown identifier is unauthorized and does not leak account existence details.
pm.test('TC_PM_AUTH_06 response contains unauthorized error', function () {
// TC_PM_AUTH_07 - Assert: bearer accessToken from TC_PM_AUTH_04 returns the current student profile.
pm.test('TC_PM_AUTH_07 response contains authenticated user data', function () {
// TC_PM_AUTH_08 - Assert: protected profile endpoint rejects requests without bearer token.
pm.test('TC_PM_AUTH_08 response contains unauthorized error', function () {
// TC_PM_AUTH_09 - Arrange: prepare a deterministic fullName for the update-profile mutation.
// Rollback is handled in the test script by restoring studentOriginalFullName after the assertion.
// TC_PM_AUTH_09 - Assert: profile update succeeds and returns the updated fullName.
pm.test('TC_PM_AUTH_09 response contains updated profile', function () {
// TC_PM_AUTH_09 - Cleanup: restore the seed account fullName so later manual tests see the original profile.
pm.test('TC_PM_AUTH_09 cleanup restores original fullName', function () {
// TC_PM_AUTH_10 - Arrange: define a temporary password that satisfies the backend minimum length rule.
// This request mutates the seed account password, so the test script rolls it back immediately.
// TC_PM_AUTH_10 - Assert: changing the seed student password succeeds.
// TC_PM_AUTH_10 - Cleanup step 1: login with the temporary password to get a fresh rollback token.
pm.test('TC_PM_AUTH_10 cleanup login with temporary password succeeds', function () {
// TC_PM_AUTH_10 - Cleanup step 2: restore the original seed password.
pm.test('TC_PM_AUTH_10 cleanup restores original seed password', function () {
// TC_PM_AUTH_10 - Cleanup step 3: login again with the restored password and save tokens for TC_PM_AUTH_11.
pm.test('TC_PM_AUTH_10 cleanup saves fresh tokens after rollback', function () {
// TC_PM_AUTH_11 - Assert: refreshToken from the authenticated flow returns a new token pair.
// Save the refreshed tokens so the environment remains usable after this folder run.
pm.test('TC_PM_AUTH_11 response contains refreshed tokens', function () {

item.name: 02 - Course APIs
item.description: 7 test cases: create, validation, list, search, update name, delete, delete missing course

item.name: SETUP_COURSE - Login teacher and save token
item.description: Setup request for Course API tests. This request is not counted as a Course TC.

exec: // SETUP_COURSE - Arrange: login with the seed teacher account before Course API tests.
// Save the teacher access token and teacherId for all TC_PM_COURSE_* requests.
pm.test('SETUP_COURSE saves teacher auth context', function () {
// TC_PM_COURSE_01 - Arrange: generate a unique course name for a repeatable create-course test.
// This mutation creates a course that is reused by list/search/update/delete tests and deleted in TC_PM_COURSE_06.
// TC_PM_COURSE_01 - Assert: teacher can create a course with a valid courseName and teacherId.
pm.test('TC_PM_COURSE_01 response contains created course data', function () {

item.name: TC_PM_COURSE_02 - Create course with empty name

exec: // TC_PM_COURSE_02 - Assert: validation rejects an empty courseName.
pm.test('TC_PM_COURSE_02 status is 400 Bad Request', function () {
pm.test('TC_PM_COURSE_02 response contains validation error', function () {
// TC_PM_COURSE_03 - Assert: list endpoint returns the course created in TC_PM_COURSE_01.
pm.test('TC_PM_COURSE_03 response contains created course', function () {
// TC_PM_COURSE_04 - Assert: search filters teacher courses by courseName/publicId.
pm.test('TC_PM_COURSE_04 response includes the searched course', function () {
// TC_PM_COURSE_05 - Assert: PATCH /courses/:courseId/name updates only the courseName field.
pm.test('TC_PM_COURSE_05 response contains updated courseName', function () {
// TC_PM_COURSE_06 - Assert: delete removes the course created for this test flow.
// Cleanup: this is the rollback step for TC_PM_COURSE_01 and prevents test data from accumulating.
// TC_PM_COURSE_07 - Assert: deleting a valid ObjectId that does not exist returns 404.
// This negative test does not mutate data and needs no rollback.
pm.test('TC_PM_COURSE_07 status is 404 Not Found', function () {
pm.test('TC_PM_COURSE_07 response contains not found error', function () {

exec: // TC_PM_CERT_01 - Assert: teacher can issue a certificate for an existing graded submission.
// This mutation creates or returns one certificate for the student/exam submission.
pm.test('TC_PM_CERT_01 response contains certificate data', function () {
// TC_PM_CERT_02 - Assert: authenticated teacher can list certificates with pagination.
pm.test('TC_PM_CERT_02 response contains paginated certificate data', function () {

pm.test('TC_PM_CERT_03 response contains requested certificate', function () {

// TC_PM_CERT_05 - Assert: teacher can revoke the issued certificate.

// TC_PM_CERT_07 - Assert: public lookup can find a certificate by certificateId.

pm.test('TC_PM_CERT_07 response contains lookup result', function () {
// TC_PM_CERT_07 - Cleanup step 1: delete temporary exam and its submission records.

// TC_PM_CERT_07 - Cleanup step 2: delete the temporary course after the exam is removed.
